name: Journal Downloader
description: Batch download PDFs from journal TOC pages + export TOC to Markdown with full title/DOI/links/abstract. Parsers: NEJM, Nature, Science, Lancet, BMJ. Hybrid abstract fetch: Crossref API first → HTML scrape fallback. v3.8: BMJ News/Editorial lede fallback — if no abstract section, take first 3 paragraphs of .fulltext-view capped at 1500 chars.
